summary: Completed the second V5 live autonomy pilot evidence chain. The repository now has a deterministic v5-autonomy-status CLI command, CLI test coverage, documentation aligned to the implemented output, three live Claude Code product slices, runtime launch and execution evidence, runtime-run/result/summary artifacts, and autonomy metrics showing three ready slices and zero blocked slices. Product changes were authored by live executors; coordinator work was limited to contract, scope, runtime configuration, validation, evidence recording, and audit artifacts.
policy_result: Passed locally and through GitHub PR gates. The task stayed inside the issue 080 execution contract and scope manifest. Live product slices used bounded Claude Code launch plans with declared write scopes. PR 81 passed GitHub CI and was squash-merged into main as commit b6c817d82e6814ee9dc66bcf640e42b213b6f9f4. The coordinator did not author product remediation in scripts/specbridge.ps1, scripts/test-specbridge-cli.ps1, README.md, or docs/specbridge-v5-autonomy-status.md after live execution started. The only coordinator artifact correction was a runtime execution diagnostic preview normalization for schema validation; it did not change exit code, status, stdout hash, stderr hash, product files, or validation outcomes.
risk_result: Medium risk. This task used live Claude Code execution and modified local CLI behavior, tests, documentation, and runtime evidence. No secrets, production configuration, billing, authentication, authorization, database, dependency installation, CI/CD security change, or deployment automation were involved. GitHub CI and merge gates completed successfully through PR 81.
unresolved_risks: The first implementation attempt failed only because max_budget_usd 0.25 was too low; it produced no product changes and the one allowed live retry succeeded.
The tests runtime execution required one live retry because the first successful runtime artifact had an invalid multibyte diagnostic preview.
The docs runtime execution required one live retry to align documented example values with the implemented CLI output.
merge_status: Merged through PR 81 with squash commit b6c817d82e6814ee9dc66bcf640e42b213b6f9f4 after GitHub CI passed.
